# MFD Communications for MFDs and Customers

: Naman Agarwal
Created time: October 21, 2024 12:32 PM
Status: Not started
Last edited: December 24, 2024 2:11 PM

# **What problem are we solving?**

- unclear and mistimed comms leads to lot of escalations.
- we are sending comms with wrong informations
- Some of the comms are not compliant
-

# **Appendix**

## Meeting notes

- Welcome mail
- Get account and GSTN if not provided
- Monthly payout mail
- GST mail
- Statement +GST invoice  , template

| Objective | KR1 | Metrics | Initiatives |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Improve MFD impressions on volt | Increase Volt MFD platforms Impressions by 50% | • No of Platforms Volt available / Total MFD platforms in market<br>• Social media impressions | • Conduct market size and channels benchmarking<br>• Research available platforms<br>• Analyze MFD potential to understand top of funnel<br>• Implement SM strategy and content marketing |
| Improve MFD registration rate | Increase Volt MFD registrations from x to y | • % registration<br>• TAT for registration | • Create landing pages<br>• Launch webinar hosting portal<br>• Map Partner Platform user journeys and persona<br>• Create guided journey for application creation |
| Improve MFD activation rate | Increase MFD activity on the MFD portals | • Activity rate on volt platform<br>• TAT for activation<br>• % Activation 2568<br>• % Empanelment 14256<br>• % Customer registered 4538 | • Provide dashboards for customer data to B2B partners<br>• Allow downloading SOA and raising service requests<br>• Map customer journey and MFD touchpoints<br>• Create automated workflows |
| Improve MFD Repeat rates | Improve repeat rate | • Number of Portal visits<br>• Number of Customers registered<br>• Number of Credit limits checked<br>• Number of applications initiated<br>• Number of applications converted | • Introduce leaderboards (monthly and overall)<br>• Award badges<br>• Organize competitions<br>• Collect feedback<br>• Develop new partner dashboard for B2B partners<br>• Implement CSAT tools |
| Reduce Communication Issues | Reduce Calls/Messaging per application | • Reduce MFD portals errors/bugs<br>• Reduce LAMF journey bugs<br>• Reduce Process comms escalations<br>• Reduce Educational support requests<br>• Reduce Payout related support requests<br>• Reduce enquiry related support requests | • Ensure MFD receives communications and issues before borrowers<br>• Review current communication systems<br>• Fix communication sequencing<br>• Improve payout comms<br>• Improve Format of Invoices<br>• Integrate ticketing systems<br>• Implement WABA system |
| Enhance Application Process | - | - | • Improve handling of camera permissions<br>• Streamline camera and KYC link processes<br>• Address disbursement issues<br>• Send live selfie link<br>• Send KYC link<br>• Validate mobile numbers via OTP |
| Boost Marketing and Engagement | - | - | • Identify and set up marketing tools<br>• Create automated workflows<br>• Collect feedback and generate reports<br>• Notifications for eligible but uncreated loans<br>• Notifications on market sell-off days<br>• Conduct weekly and monthly marketing campaigns<br>• Adopt marketing tools |
| Platform Improvements | - | - | • Assess the impact potential of the Volt Partner app<br>• Plan projects to maximize potential reach<br>• Provide B2B MFD team tools<br>• Conduct RCA on low conversion rates |
